no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestMetricCommandsValidateRunHistoryAndCompare|TestMetricCommandsRefuseMixedUnitsAndGroupHistoryByUnit' && go test ./internal/metric -run 'TestCompareAndTrendRejectMixedUnitsAndGroupHistoryByUnit'
rationale: The current tree already satisfies the bead contract, so no code changes were needed.

Evidence:
- `cli/internal/metric/store.go:85-143` refuses mixed units in `Compare` and `Trend` via `singleHistoryUnit` and groups history by unit in `GroupedHistory`.
- `cli/internal/metric/store.go:246-290` emits the clear `metric %q has mixed units: ...` error and preserves per-unit ordering.
- `cli/cmd/metric_acceptance_test.go:70-145` covers the end-to-end round-trip from metric definition to `exec run` to populated history to `metric show`.
- `cli/cmd/metric_acceptance_test.go:148-209` covers mixed-unit refusal in `metric compare` and `metric trend`, plus JSON history grouped by unit.
- `cli/internal/metric/store_test.go:117-209` covers mixed-unit refusal and unit grouping at the store level.
